description: D7 Lead Finder is a B2B prospecting tool that searches a global database by keyword and location to deliver up to 1,200 contact leads per query in under 3 minutes.
tagline: Find Business Leads in Any Industry by Keyword
overview: D7 Lead Finder lets sales and marketing teams search a worldwide business database by keyword and location, returning up to 1,200 verified contacts per query in three minutes or less. Each result includes emails, websites, social media links, review scores, tech stack data, and advertising activity.
what_is: D7 Lead Finder is a B2B lead generation tool that helps teams discover prospects anywhere in the world by combining keyword and location search. Each query returns up to 1,200 contacts complete with email addresses, websites, and social media profiles. The tool is built for speed, making it easy to assemble targeted lead lists for sales or marketing campaigns without manual research.

Results arrive in three minutes or less, so teams can move from search to outreach quickly. D7 Lead Finder slots into the go-to-market stack as a data source, feeding contacts directly into CRM systems or email platforms via bulk export. It handles data enrichment and lead filtering out of the box, covering company details, online review scores, website technologies, and advertising signals.

The tool is purpose-built for fast lead discovery and export rather than relationship management or deep analytics. Teams that need a quick, low-friction way to pull targeted contact lists for specific industries or regions get the most value from it.
